description: Adds an entry to a node's hosts file. Useful when adding an agent in an environment with no (or incomplete) DNS, so the node can resolve the primary server before bootstrap.

m_ip.description: IP address to add to the hosts file

m_host.description: Hostname (FQDN) to associate with the IP address

hosts_file.description: Path to the hosts file to update. Defaults to /etc/hosts on *nix and %windir%\System32\drivers\etc\hosts on Windows.
